prompt: Create a bold, cinematic advertising poster for a premium surveillance/security camera brand in a luxury editorial style. Feature an extreme close-up of a majestic owl facing forward against a rich deep crimson/red seamless background. The owl should fill most of the frame, with one natural glowing amber eye and the other eye replaced by a sleek modern camera lens, integrated realistically into the face like a cybernetic enhancement. Add subtle red focus brackets around the lens to emphasize precision targeting. The owl’s feathers should be hyper-detailed, sharp, and dramatic with moody studio lighting and high contrast shadows. The composition should feel intense, minimal, and premium, similar to a high-end tech campaign. Typography should be clean, modern, and bold in white sans-serif font. Place the main headline in the lower-middle/right area: “ALWAYS WATCHING." Smaller subheadline beneath it: “precision that never sleeps” Add a subtle tagline in the bottom-right corner: “Every second counts. We miss nothing.” Place the brand logo in the bottom-left corner in clean white minimalist typography. Style references: luxury advertising campaign, cyberpunk wildlife concept, premium Sony/Canon /Blackmagic design aesthetic, ultra-realistic, sharp focus, dramatic editorial composition, photorealistic, 4k.
